Woman wakes up in the coffin at her funeral #shorts
snippet.description:
An Ecuadorian woman has risen from the 'dead' after almost being buried alive.

Shocking video footage shows the moment 76-year-old Bella Montoya was rescued from her coffin, after being stuck inside for over four hours.

The woman was declared deceased after suffering a stroke in hospital and taken to a local funeral home for preparations.

#BuriedAlive #Ecuador #BellaMontoya #Coffin #10NewsFirst

snippet.title: Three orders of Hell Naw - Barbershop 2: Back In Business (2004)
snippet.description:
The owner of an historic South Side Chicago barbershop is pressured to sell out to a land developer, but must face the impact this would have on his close-knit community.

Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCf5CjDJvsFvtVIhkfmKAwAA?sub_confirmation=1
Watch more MGM videos: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLwwhtOnMyjuz28RRvQATj8OdD-HBBCCYX 

Barbershop 2: Back In Business (2004)
Directed by Kevin Rodney Sullivan
Written by Don D. Scott
Based on Characters Created by Mark Brown
Cast: Ice Cube, Cedric The Entertainer, Sean Patrick Thomas, Eve, Troy Garity, Michael Ealy, Leonard Earl Hoze, Harry Lennix, Kenan Thompson, Garcelle Meauvais-Nilon, and Queen Latifah
Rated PG-13 for language, sexual material and brief drug references
Barbershop is a trademark of Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer Studios Inc. All Rights Reserved.
Available on Blu-Ray, DVD and digital platforms. 

About MGM Studios: Metro Goldwyn Mayer (MGM) is a leading entertainment company focused on the production and global distribution of film and television content across all platforms. The company owns one of the world’s deepest libraries of premium film and television content as well as the premium pay television network MGM+, which is available throughout the U.S. via cable, satellite, telco and digital distributors.  In addition, MGM has investments in numerous other television channels, digital platforms and interactive ventures and is producing premium short-form content for distribution.

snippet.title: Small Tornado on a Parking Lot
snippet.description:
content is altered or ai generated #shorts 

Small Tornado on a Parking Lot

There are Four Major Kinds Of Storms: Thunderstorms, Tornadoes, Hurricane
How Do Tornadoes Form ?
Tornadoes form when warm, humid air collides with cold, dry air. The denser cold air is pushed over the warm air, usually producing thunderstorms. The warm air rises through the colder air, causing an updraft. The updraft will begin to rotate if winds vary sharply in speed or direction

Online shop https://vilonttornado.myshopify.com/

snippet.title: Charles Oakley's Brutal Truth on Why He'll Never Coach Again! #shortvideo #shorts #short #nba
snippet.description:
Retired NBA star and former coach Charles Oakley speaks his mind on why he'll never return to coaching in this must-see interview. Oakley shares some hard-hitting truths about coaching, slamming lazy coaches who can't even show up on time. Drawing on his own experience on both sides of the court, Oakley gives a candid perspective on what it takes to truly excel as a coach. He tells a revealing story about how he once confronted a player for not taking his responsibilities seriously and how that moment inspired him to become a better coach. This video is packed with insider tips and no-holds-barred insights that any aspiring coach should take to heart. Watch it now, and never look at coaching the same way again!

Full Video🔗:  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3g6N3zkxRPk

snippet.description:
Listen to the full episode of A Life Of Greatness: https://podcasts.apple.com/au/podcast/a-life-of-greatness/id1457268944

This week Sarah Grynberg is joined by John Edward. John is one of the world’s foremost psychic mediums and the author of the critically-acclaimed, New York Times Best Sellers One Last Time, Crossing Over: The Stories Behind the Stories, What if God Were the Sun, After Life: Answers from the Other Side, Practical Praying: Using the Rosary to Enhance Your Life, Final Beginnings, Infinite Quest and Fallen Masters. 

In A Life of Greatness, host Sarah Grynberg interviews some of the world's chief thought-leaders, sports legends, entertainers, best selling authors and inspiring spiritual minds as they explain how they have overcome challenges, conquered self-limiting beliefs and connected with a deeper sense of self to achieve greatness in their lives, manifestation and provide practical tips and advice for how you can too.

snippet.title: The Evolution of Randy Orton🤯🤯#shorts
snippet.description:
🔥 Join us on a fascinating journey through the life and career of Randy Orton, as we follow him through the years, from a young wrestler to a seasoned veteran! The Evolution of Randy Orton

👦 Early Days:
Step back in time to the early years of Randy Orton's wrestling career. Watch as a young and promising talent enters the ring and begins his journey to becoming a household name.

🧔 Prime Years:
As Randy Orton enters his prime, witness his evolution into one of the WWE's top superstars. Follow the rise of the "Viper" as he dominates the wrestling world with his signature moves and charismatic presence.

👨‍🦳 Seasoned Veteran:
As the years go by, Randy Orton continues to adapt and grow in the wrestling industry. Experience his transition from a young sensation to a seasoned veteran, mastering his craft and captivating audiences worldwide.

👴 The Legacy Continues:
Join us as we explore Randy Orton's later years in the wrestling world. Discover how he maintains his status as a respected and revered figure in the industry, passing on his knowledge to the next generation.

🤯 Don't miss this incredible journey through the ages of Randy Orton's career, from a young rookie to a seasoned veteran. Witness his evolution and the lasting impact he's made on the world of professional wrestling! 💪🤼

👉 Subscribe now to stay updated on the stories of wrestling legends and their enduring legacies! 🌟 #randyorton  #wwe #wrestlinglegends

snippet.title: She Gets A SURPRISE! 😱
snippet.description:
Welcome to King’s Guard Tours, a channel dedicated to royal traditions, ceremonial events and British pageantry 🇬🇧

We bring you immersive and engaging videos of the Changing of the Guard, Household Cavalry events at Horse Guards, and major Royal Family events 👑

Our videos often feature the King and Queen, the Prince and Princess of Wales (Prince William and Catherine), and other members of the Royal Family, including Prince Edward, Duchess Sophie, and Princess Anne.

Wherever you are in the world, you are very welcome here. If you enjoy royal traditions, history, and behind the scenes glimpses of these iconic events, make sure to subscribe to King’s Guard Tours 🇬🇧

🔔 Subscribe here: https://m.youtube.com/@KingsGuardTours

⭐ Consider becoming a channel member to support the channel: https://m.youtube.com/@KingsGuardTours/join

King’s Guard Tours is an independent channel and is not affiliated with the British Army, Household Division, Ministry of Defence, or the Royal Household.

© Copyright Notice
All content on King’s Guard Tours, including videos, images and graphics, is protected by copyright law. Unauthorised use, copying, distribution, or reuse is strictly prohibited.

📩 Business and media enquiries: Hello@KingsGuardTours.com

snippet.title: WWE Had To DELETE These Chris Benoit Moments...
snippet.description:
In 2004, Chris Benoit achieved his dream of becoming World Champion in wrestling, but after the tragic loss of his friend Eddie Guerrero, he fell into a deep depression and isolated himself. When he didn't show up for a scheduled match, authorities discovered he had passed away along with his wife and child. WWE initially paid tribute to Benoit but later removed all mentions of him from their programming due to the disturbing circumstances of his death.

More UNFORGETTABLE Moments🔥👉 https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLfxt5-QKbFSXxCdfHufV3-Iv7ZcxrExtB

#wwe #wweshorts #prowrestling #shorts

snippet.title: The youngest son of Queen Elizabeth #royal #royalfamily #queenelizabeth #princessdiana
snippet.description: Prince Edward is the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II. Being practically the last in line to the throne, he never expected to be able to become the ruler of Great Britain, and therefore enjoyed the privileges of a member of the royal family, and was free to choose his education and work. Like his older brother Charles, Edward went to Cambridge, where he majored in history, and received his degree in 1986. At the age of 23, Edward became a production assistant for such iconic musicals as Cats and The Phantom of the Opera. But the prince's own productions were a failure, and he switched from theater to television. In 1993, Edward founded his own company, which produced documentaries about British rulers, palaces and other elements of the sweet life. Edward is the only one of Elizabeth and Philip's children who has not gone through a divorce and the accompanying scandals, and is truly happy in family life.

snippet.title: Steve Harvey Meets Tap-Dancing Twins Freddy & Teddy!
snippet.description:
Freddy and Teddy are tap-dancing twins from Los Angeles. Freddy wants to be a chef, whilst Teddy wants to pursue tap dancing professionally. They tell Steve Harvey about their aspirations and the dynamics of their partnership. Freddy and Teddy also give us a dazzling performance inspired by the Nicholas Brothers. 

▶ SUBSCRIBE FOR MORE: http://bit.ly/LittleBigShotsUK

▶ CHECK OUT MORE AMAZING DANCERS: https://bit.ly/30WGauh

▶ CHECK OUT MORE AMAZING TALENTS: https://bit.ly/32NstP4

Little Big Shots is all about showing you some of the funniest and most talented children you’ll ever meet from all over the world 🌍. But this isn’t a competition, we’re not here to judge and there are no prizes – just loads of amazing kids doing incredible things that they love. With Dawn French as the host of this talent show, get ready to laugh as she tries to pick up some new skills from these stars…

We’ll upload a new video every week giving you the best moments from the interviews and performances, as well as a few original YouTube exclusive clips!

Subscribe to show us some love 💜 and click on the bell 🔔 to find out every time we upload a new video. And remember to leave your comments in the box beneath each video – we’d love to hear what you think of these little superstars!
